scripts.build: echo 'Compiling lib-medium-18...' && sleep 2.1 && echo 'Generating types...' && sleep 0.2 && echo 'lib-medium-18 ready!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.dev: echo 'lib-medium-18 watching...' && while true; do sleep 2; echo '[lib-medium-18] rebuilt in 45ms'; done
scripts.test: echo 'Running lib-medium-18 tests...' && sleep .6 && echo '  Suite: unit - 5 passed' && echo '  Suite: integration - 3 passed'
